title: Converting SQL Server code to PostgreSQL
summary: Google Cloud demonstrates using Gemini as an AI tutor to convert SQL Server T-SQL code to PostgreSQL, including translation of data types like IDENTITY and BIT. The tool explains conversion logic to help developers understand PostgreSQL migration.
writeup: This video shows Google Cloud using Gemini as an AI tutor to convert SQL Server T-SQL code into PostgreSQL, covering data type translations such as IDENTITY and BIT. Beyond producing converted code, the tool explains the conversion logic so developers can understand why each change is made. The result is a walkthrough of schema migration that pairs code generation with reasoning about PostgreSQL equivalents.
